name: @aukora/immune
description: METAPHORICAL immune-system substrate (research/skunkworks): pure, offline, advisory scoring + state functions over threat-signature data. Not biology, not aliveness, not production. Never grants authority; no actuator, no persistence, no prompt wiring. Monorepo-internal, source-exported (consumed via bundler resolution like its peers); NOT published — no dist build.
author: Aumara
